Package io.forja.components.inputs.fxAutocomplete

Class FxAutocomplete.Builder<T>

java.lang.Object
io.forja.builder.FxNodeBuilder<FxAutocomplete<T>,FxAutocomplete.Builder<T>>
io.forja.components.inputs.fxAutocomplete.FxAutocomplete.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - item type
Enclosing class:
FxAutocomplete<T>
public static class FxAutocomplete.Builder<T> extends FxNodeBuilder<FxAutocomplete<T>,FxAutocomplete.Builder<T>>
Fluent builder for constructing an FxAutocomplete.

Defaults:

  • items — empty
  • text / promptText — empty
  • variant — InputVariant.DEFAULT
  • helperText / errorText — empty
  • stringifier — Object.toString()

    • build

      public FxAutocomplete<T> build()
      Description copied from class: FxNodeBuilder
      Constructs and returns the configured component.

      Implementations must call FxNodeBuilder.applyBase(Node) on the constructed node before returning it.

      Specified by:
      build in class FxNodeBuilder<FxAutocomplete<T>,FxAutocomplete.Builder<T>>
      Returns:
      the built component
